evidence: "Basically it was a very good drama with a twist ending that’s worth watching for 2 1/2 hours."
"I enjoy all genres of film and this one is the best one I’ve seen in a long time."
"I found Parasite difficult to watch- though it’s supposed to be humorous and dramatic I did not find one moment that made was less than dark."
"The harsh wording in some of these reviews and the accusations lead me to believe they are prejudice against Midwesterners."
"He’s not trying to be a hero, he’s just a determined father."
"The relationship with Everett grows slowly but every moment on that path is a delight."
"The screenwriter & director created such a beautiful film, one that I believe will still hold up as one of the best -if not THE best- for years."
"I am not a rabid Quentin Tarantino fan so this is an unbiased opinion."
"I simply adore the book, and I read it whenever I want to visit the ladies at Cranford so that is usually once a year."
"The film locations are breathtaking and the cast breathed such life into their roles that is believable, not over the top or stereotypical."
"This story has moved me so deeply, that even though it’s over - I still can’t let go."
"Without a doubt this will still leave a lasting impression."
"Some moments brought joy and some actually made me cry and broke my heart."

summary: The user has a strong preference for drama and historical fiction, appreciating slow-paced narratives with high production quality and emotional depth. They value sensory experiences and are sensitive to the quality of performances and direction, often expressing a desire for meaningful storytelling.
